# Analytics Engine

> **Mirror**: [`analytics_engine.py`](../../../src/core/analytics_engine.py)
> **Role**: Core Component

## Purpose
*(Auto-generated summary based on code structure)*

## Architecture

### Functions
- **`shannon_entropy`**: Calculate Shannon Entropy from a list of categorical values.
- **`entropy_normalized`**: Normalized entropy (0-1 scale).
- **`cyclomatic_complexity`**: Calculate Cyclomatic Complexity from source code.
- **`halstead_metrics`**: Calculate Halstead metrics from source code.
- **`compute_node_metrics`**: Compute all metrics for a single node.
- **`compute_codebase_entropy`**: Compute entropy statistics for a field across all nodes.
- **`compute_all_metrics`**: Compute all statistical metrics for a codebase.
